chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1328 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents-SMC, Sukkur. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G Sindh. **** By consent, this petition is disposed of in the terms that the petitioner will file fresh representation before the Municipal Commissioner, Sukkur Municipal Corporation (respondent No.4) along with entire original documents, who after hearing the petitioner and going through the law, shall decide the same by way of speaking order within 30-days. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
